summary: Frontend video player URL detection verified on /watch/{episodeId}. All 8 URL variants render the correct iframe/video element with expected data-testid and converted src.
passed: BitChute page URL https://www.bitchute.com/video/ABCDxyz/ -> iframe data-testid=bitchute-player src=https://www.bitchute.com/embed/ABCDxyz/
BitChute embed URL used as-is -> data-testid=bitchute-player
Rumble embed URL used as-is -> data-testid=rumble-player
YouTube watch URL -> data-testid=yt-player src includes youtube.com/embed/<id>
Vimeo URL -> data-testid=vimeo-player src includes player.vimeo.com/video/<id>
Unknown URL (twitch player) -> data-testid=generic-player iframe with original src
notes: Seeded admin user/session and 1 series + 8 episodes directly in MongoDB per /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Visited /watch/{episodeId} for each URL variant, set session_token cookie, and asserted iframe/video element existed with the expected data-testid and src attribute. No video network playback was required to validate the URL detection logic.
